from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_73251a56(I):
    x1 = dmirror(I)
    x2 = papply(pair, I, x1)
    x3 = lbind(apply, maximum)
    x4 = apply(x3, x2)
    x5 = mostcolor(x4)
    x6 = replace(x4, ZERO, x5)
    x7 = index(x6, ORIGIN)
    x8 = shoot(ORIGIN, UNITY)
    O = fill(x6, x7, x8)
    return O
